findings.title: Recommended no-spec handoff does not actually invoke the bootstrap workflow
findings.detail: In Step 2.5, selecting "specflow.spec を実行" only says to run `/specflow.spec` and stop. Unlike the existing `/specflow.decompose` handoff in the same file, there is no explicit instruction to read `global/commands/specflow.spec.md` and follow that workflow.

findings.title: Baseline spec validation command does not target the generated spec
findings.detail: Step 4d runs `openspec validate --type spec --json`, but validate requires a positional item name. Validate each generated spec explicitly.

findings.title: CLI-first spec generation required by the spec is still unimplemented
findings.detail: Acceptance criterion 4 requires using OpenSpec CLI instructions/templates when they exist. The current Step 4 always writes a hardcoded canonical template.

findings.title: Empty-project flow does not satisfy the manual capability entry requirement
findings.detail: No dedicated N=0 branch for when no capabilities are auto-detected. The command must prompt the user to define capabilities manually.

findings.title: No regression coverage for the new bootstrap and no-spec branches
findings.detail: No automated coverage or scripted verification for the no-spec prompt, skip path, bootstrap execution, zero-capability handling, or validation failures.
